canonical_digest_source: gap.revalidated_on_digest (platform ctxpack pointer at gap creation)
primary_cause: Base image python:3.11-slim is a mutable tag. Today it resolves to sha256:a3ab0b966bc4e91546... The platform build used a different base image digest at production build time. This alone prevents bit-identical reproduction without the original base image digest.
repair_candidates: CUTOVER-C-03: Add pip hash verification — pip-compile --generate-hashes
CUTOVER-C-04: Declare build platform — --platform=linux/amd64 in CI workflow
artifact_type_note: canonical_digest is the platform context-pack pointer (ctxpack_digest from the governance boundary, revalidated_on_digest from the gap record). rebuilt_digest is the Docker image content hash produced by local build. These measure different artifact types. The Docker image is internally non-deterministic regardless of canonical pointer type.
